items.title: Inauguration of OTM Complex at Puducherry
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Defence Inauguration of OTM Complex at Puducherry Posted On: 25 APR 2026 8:52PM by PIB Delhi Director General Indian Coast Guard, DG Paramesh Sivamani inaugurated the state-of-the-art OTM Administrative Complex of Coast Guard District Headquarters No. 13 at Puducherry on 25 April 2026. The inauguration marks a significant milestone in strengthening India’s mar…
